mapper.select: SELECT user_id, user_nm, COALESCE(user_info->>'password', '') AS password_hash, COALESCE(user_info->>'grade_cd', '') AS grade_cd, COALESCE(user_info->>'user_status', '') AS user_status, COALESCE((user_info->>'password_fail_cnt')::int, 0) AS password_fail_cnt, COALESCE(user_info->>'access_ip_limit', 'N') AS access_ip_limit, COALESCE(user_info->'access_ip', '[]'::jsonb)::text AS access_ip_json, COALESCE(user_info->>'second_auth_yn', 'N') AS second_auth_yn, COALESCE(user_info->>'email_id', '') AS email_id FROM om_user_m WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = false

UPDATE om_user_m SET user_info = CASE WHEN COALESCE((user_info->>'password_fail_cnt')::int, 0) + 1 >= #{maxPasswordFailCount} THEN jsonb_set( jsonb_set( user_info, '{password_fail_cnt}', to_jsonb(COALESCE((user_info->>'password_fail_cnt')::int, 0) + 1), true), '{user_status}', to_jsonb('LOCKED'::text), true) ELSE jsonb_set( user_info, '{password_fail_cnt}', to_jsonb(COALESCE((user_info->>'password_fail_cnt')::int, 0) + 1), true) END, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_by = #{userId} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = false RETURNING COALESCE((user_info->>'password_fail_cnt')::int, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE om_user_m SET user_info = jsonb_set( user_info, '{last_login_dtm}', to_jsonb(to_char(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SSOF')), true), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_by = #{userId} WHERE user_id = #{userId}

UPDATE om_user_m SET user_info = jsonb_set( jsonb_set( CASE WHEN COALESCE(user_info->>'user_status', '') = 'LOCKED' THEN jsonb_set(user_info, '{user_status}', to_jsonb('ACTIVE'::text), true) ELSE user_info END, '{password}', to_jsonb(#{passwordHash}::text), true), '{password_fail_cnt}', to_jsonb(0), true), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = false
